content.speakerText: I’m so jealous—I’ve been wanting to hike for months!
content.speakerTextCn: 我好羡慕啊，我早就想徒步了！

options.text: You totally should! I’ve got a beginner trail map if you want.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了具体帮助（路线图）并鼓励行动，符合‘确认共鸣并转化为行动’的核心策略。其他选项要么冷漠（That’s nice）、否定对方兴趣（I don’t like hiking），要么拖延（Maybe next year），缺乏情感连接。

options.text: Yeah, I’ll send you the map tonight. What time works for you?

content.explanation: 正确答案通过具体行动（发地图）和下一步确认（你几点方便？）巩固关系，是高阶回应。'Cool!' 虽然积极但空泛，'I guess so' 和 'Hiking is overrated' 都破坏了共鸣氛围。

content.speakerText: I’ve been dying to try that new Italian restaurant!
content.speakerTextCn: 我早就想试试那家新意大利餐厅了！

options.text: I eat there all the time.
Oh really? I’ve been meaning to go too—how about we try it together this Friday?

content.explanation: 正确答案通过共鸣（我也想试试）+ 具体提议（周五一起去）建立连接，符合场景核心。其他选项要么炫耀（I eat there...）、否定兴趣（too heavy）或转移话题（prefer Chinese），均未回应情感需求。

content.template: You totally should! I’ve got a beginner trail map if you want ___ .
content.hint: 表示‘如果你想要’的常用表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：if you want to

content.hint: 在计划共同活动时，主动承担小任务的常见内容
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频词汇：snacks（共同活动中的常见准备物品）

content.template: That sounds amazing! I’ve been wanting to ___ that too—let’s plan it together!
content.hint: 回应他人兴趣时，表达‘我也想尝试’的常用动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：want to try + 活动/体验

content.speakerText: I’m so jealous—I’ve been wanting to hike for months!
content.speakerTextCn: 我好羡慕啊，我早就想徒步了！
expectedAnswers: You totally should! I’ve got a beginner trail map if you want.
Yeah, hiking is the best way to unwind—I can share my favorite trail with you.
That’s awesome! I just did a hike last weekend—want me to send you the route?
evaluationCriteria: 是否回应了对方的情感（羡慕/渴望）并表达共鸣
是否使用了场景关键词如 'trail', 'map', 'hike' 或类似表达
是否将共鸣转化为具体行动建议（分享资源、提议计划）

expectedAnswers: Yeah, I’ll send you the map tonight. What time works for you?
Cool! I’ll bring water and snacks—we can make it a full day out.
Perfect! Let’s meet at 8 a.m. at the trailhead—I’ve got a map and a thermos of coffee!
evaluationCriteria: 是否确认并强化了对方的积极情绪
是否添加了具体计划细节（时间、物品、地点）
是否避免了空泛回应如 'Cool!' 或 'Nice!' 而未推进互动

content.speakerText: I’ve been dreaming of visiting Japan next year!
content.speakerTextCn: 我一直在梦想明年去日本！
expectedAnswers: That’s so exciting! I went last year—I can send you my itinerary and recommend the best ramen spots.
Wow, Japan is amazing! I’ve always wanted to go too—maybe we could plan a trip together?
You totally should! I’ve got a list of budget-friendly hostels and cultural tips if you’re interested.
evaluationCriteria: 是否表达出对对方梦想的真诚共鸣
是否提供具体支持（推荐、资源、计划）而非仅泛泛称赞
是否自然使用了场景核心表达如 'You totally should', 'I’ve got...', 'let’s plan...'
